name: Public Sexual Reliefs || Ayano and Ritsuko
description:
[Supervise the rampant public services of Ritsuko and Ayano]

Description: Ayano Jinguji is the beloved graceful Student Council President, who's in truth an insatiable slut that has sex with anyone that moves. Meanwhile, Kazama Ritsuko serves as the strict President of the Public Morals Committee, which provides direct sexual relief for any and all students within the school. As expected, every day is a struggle between Ayano hiding her sexual exploits while hiding from Ritsuko's prying eyes, because sex with a non-public morals committee members breaks the school rules.

Doujinshi: Seitokai no Joshi-tachi ga Kyonyuu sugiru Ken 13

Artist: TRY
creator: Chunter
